3331600.name: Hardships Of A Vampire
3331600.description:
Story:

Oliver was dealt a bad hand in life. Being a poor orphan, he worked hard to get his big break - but now, he's stuck working the night shift at a convenience store for minimum wage. What's a vampire to do?!

As it turns out, two people are willing to help him: a flirty customer and his way-too-perfect co-worker. They have secrets of their own, however, which makes Oliver wonder. Can he really trust them?

Features:

  • Two love interest routes with four endings

  • Fully hand drawn custom artworks

  • 30+ event CGs

  • Wholesome vampires!
